prompt: Create a warm, naturalistic vertical outdoor portrait in golden-hour sunlight: a young woman with long brown hair in two braids sits barefoot on the grass in a wildflower meadow under a leafy green tree canopy, wearing a light cream sleeveless summer dress. She is centered, knees up toward the camera, gently holding exactly 1 tabby cat in her lap; the cat faces forward with clear striped fur and alert eyes. Include exactly 2 large dogs sitting close beside her: 1 dark brown shaggy dog on the left and 1 golden retriever on the right with its tongue out. Add exactly 3 opaque square censor blocks in a warm brown color covering the faces of the woman and both dogs, while leaving the cat unobscured. Use soft backlighting from the upper left, sun flare, dappled leaves, shallow depth of field, blurred foreground daisies and grass, a dreamy candid film-photography look, realistic skin and fur texture, natural warm color grading, vertical 9:16 composition, low camera angle, no text, no watermark.
